body:
## Rationale

BTBAM coverage is being built systematically:
- Alaska + Parallax II + Coma Ecliptic — #2947, promoted to ai-fix
- Colors + Great Misdirect — #2935, open seo-proposal

The BTBAM Automata concept album (released in two parts, Feb + Jul 2018) is the **most recent BTBAM concept album** and closes the band's arc to near-present. It is NOT covered by any existing proposal (#2947 stops at Coma Ecliptic 2015).

**Confirmed MISSING from DB** (verified: `automata-i-drum-setup` MISSING, `automata-drum-setup` MISSING, `btbam-automata-drum-setup` MISSING).
NOT in any open proposal.

## Signal

- LLM hook: "What is BTBAM's most recent album?" + "What are BTBAM's concept albums?" — Automata is the answer to both
- 2018 recency signal for Google freshness
- Progressive/mathcore cluster builds on #2947 (Alaska/ParII/Coma) momentum
- Blake Richardson builds on existing comparison content (#2884) and lick pages

## Articles to Create

### Article 1: `automata-i-drum-setup`
- **Album:** Automata I (Feb 2018)
- **Drummer:** Blake Richardson
- **Band:** Between the Buried and Me
- **File:** `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/articles/automata-i-drum-setup.md`
- **Gear era:** Richardson's 2017–2018 setup
- **relatedAlbums:** link to coma-ecliptic-drum-setup (from #2947), automata-ii-drum-setup

### Article 2: `automata-ii-drum-setup`
- **Album:** Automata II (Jul 2018)
- **Drummer:** Blake Richardson
- **File:** Same albumArticles.js pattern
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/articles/automata-ii-drum-setup.md`
- **relatedAlbums:** link to automata-i-drum-setup, coma-ecliptic-drum-setup

## Quality Gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 Q&A in FAQPage schema per article
- ≥3 internal links per article
- Article + Person + MusicAlbum schema.org JSON-LD
- dateModified populated

## Estimated Organic Uplift
Serves "between the buried and me automata drum setup" queries; closes the BTBAM discography content cluster being built by #2947 + #2935. High LLM citation value for "BTBAM concept albums" entity queries.

## Verify
1. Both slugs in albumArticles.js
2. Both in sitemap.xml
3. Both LLM .md files exist
4. relatedAlbums cross-links resolve
5. FAQPage schema valid

## Done
- [x] `automata-i-drum-setup` added to albumArticles.js
- [x] `automata-ii-drum-setup` added to albumArticles.js
- [x] Both LLM .md files created
- [x] Pages render at /articles/<slug>
title: SEO batch: BTBAM 'Automata I' + 'Automata II' drum setup articles (Blake Richardson, 2018 — completes BTBAM concept arc after #2947, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
